message:
refactor(tests): scope scheduler lock to avoid holding across run_until_quiescent

In lab_mixed_interleaving_deterministic and concurrent_provider_and_tool_registration,
the scheduler mutex was acquired and dropped in a pattern that left the lock
potentially held longer than necessary. The previous code acquired a lock,
immediately dropped it, then re-acquired for each schedule() call individually.

Replaced with a single scoped block that acquires the lock once, calls
schedule() for all tasks, then drops the lock before run_until_quiescent().
This is both clearer about intent (batch-schedule, then run) and avoids any
risk of the lock being held during the quiescent run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
